title: INCREDiBALLS in-Wash Scent Booster by Airpure, Enough for 10 Washes, Add to Laundry for Long-Lasting Fresh Scent to Household Fabrics, Keep Home & Office Smelling Clean - Fuchsia & Pearls Fragrance
features: EASY-TO-USE IN-WASH SCENT BOOSTER - Now you can add another layer of fresh scent to your home and office with INCREDiBALLS. Use the easy pour spout to measure and add them to your wash and let the fresh, clean fragrance fill your home.
ADD FRESHNESS TO ANY LIVING SPACE - Use INCREDiBALLS to freshen the bathroom, kitchen, office or any living space the next time you wash throw rugs, curtains, towels, throws, or pillow coverings.

ENJOY 10 LOADS OF FRESH FRAGRANCE - Each canister of scent booster contains enough INCREDiBALLS for 10 laundry cycles. Each little pearl contains a dose of fragrance released during the washing cycle to turn your home fabrics into air fresheners.

SCENT BOOSTER IN DESIGNER FRAGRANCES - Create a unique ambience in your home or office by choosing one of the designer fragrances INCREDiBALLS come in. Add one of these fragrances for a soothing environment you can relax and enjoy.

100% VEGAN & CRUELTY FREE - As with the other Airpure fragrance products, INCREDiBALLS are made without using any animal products, by-products or their derivatives for a completely cruel-free product.
description: Product Description "DECORATE THE AIR As part of the Airpure family of products, INCREDiBALLS In-Wash Scent Booster offers a convenient way to keep your home and office smelling fresh. Decorate the air by adding this scent booster to your laundry the next time you wash household fabrics. The canister contains enough scent booster for 10 loads of wash. This product has our 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you’re not entirely pleased with your purchase, we’ll gladly provide a replacement or refund. " Ingredients Scent Booster Directions Add the INCREDiBALLS to your wash during the laundry cycle for a long-lasting fresh scent. See more
